description: CompositionPink printed round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has three quarter sleeves, sequin work on the neckline, half hooked placket, lace detail along the placket and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironThe Mexican feather print pattern that's trending in fashion circuits is already here on myntra in this biba kurta. Fashioned to please your colour fetish, this piece can be styled with colourful capris or conservative leggings. Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
